message:
fix: scope embedding hash lookups by model_id to prevent cross-model dedup collisions

The two-tier embedding pipeline was skipping quality-pass documents
because load_embedding_hashes_by_doc returned hashes from all models,
causing the quality model to see content hashes already stored by the
fast model. Add model-scoped variants: load_embedding_hashes_by_doc_for_model
and load_embeddings_by_hashes_for_model that filter by model_id. Update
generate_embeddings_for_model to use the scoped methods. Strengthen the
E2E blend_factor=1 assertion to require (not silently skip) matching
quality docs in blended results. Add unit test covering cross-model
hash isolation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
